purpose: Bind backend model prompt packages to workflow states, tool outputs, slots, and next tool actions.
principle: A prompt is useful only when its slots are filled by concrete tool evidence and its JSON output drives the next state or repair tool.

prompt_change_policy.default_rule: Do not create new judgement prompts during a round. Use these templates and fill their slots from current-run artifacts.
allowed_adjustments: JSON field ordering or wrapper adaptation needed to read tool output
forbidden_adjustments: replace D4/D7/D8/D9 with newly invented prompt text
change blocking gates into non-blocking gates
pass product_quality with line-category pseudo translations such as This line reports or 本行说明
pass sidebar_glyph_orientation without back-rotated crop evidence
write runtime prompt/model/decision/report artifacts without validate_workspace_boundary.py evidence
encode sample filenames, fixed page numbers, fixed coordinates, fixed text, colors, or known document identity as rules
prompt_change_policy.escalation: If the existing template cannot express a required judgement, enter Ax_AdaptiveChange and record adaptive_change_record.json before returning to the triggering state.

tool_first: tools/planners/build_translation_batch_manifest.py in product_quality before D2 model calls
tools/planners/build_translation_batch_manifest.py is the source of truth for line_is_translatable; validators, layout policy, and generators must use the same required-unit semantics

tools/validators/validate_workspace_boundary.py before each D2 batch runtime artifact write, or tools/validators/validate_translation_manifest_boundaries.py to write equivalent per-batch boundary reports from the manifest
tools/validators/validate_translation_batch.py after each D2 batch model_output is written
tools/validators/validate_semantic_translations.py as the final S5 entry gate to S6

slot_bindings.translation_units: translation_batch_manifest.json batches[*].slot_values_ref translation_units, not the full document at once

bindings.product_quality_requirement: semantic translations must identify a non-placeholder translation_provider, translation_quality=semantic_translation, one output per manifest-required source unit, semantic_coverage=full_semantic_translation, and no placeholder or line-category pseudo translation patterns. Units excluded by the shared neutral/already-target-language line_is_translatable rule are not semantic-coverage obligations and must not be erased as if they were translated units.
bindings.loop_policy: S5 is a bounded D2 materialization loop. The executor must not ask D2 to translate the whole PDF in one unbounded prompt. It must iterate batches from translation_batch_manifest.json, write per-batch workspace-boundary reports either one-by-one with validate_workspace_boundary.py or in one deterministic pass with validate_translation_manifest_boundaries.py, materialize bounded chunks with materialize_d2_translation_batches.py, validate each batch, assemble only validated batch outputs, then run validate_semantic_translations.py using the same required-unit semantics as the manifest. Missing batches, failed batch validation, or inability to translate current-run units routes to S_FAIL_CAPABILITY. Any missing or failing batch workspace-boundary report routes to S_FAIL_PROCESS_CONTRACT. Chunked D2 calls are allowed only when every unit is marker-split back into the required unit_id contract and the model_output records chunk_translation evidence. For target_language=en, the materializer may remove CJK residue only from Latin-dominant mixed identifiers/entities by generic character-ratio and token-shape rules; this is postprocessing evidence, not a prompt-level sample shortcut.

required_decisions: policy numeric values must come from current-run extraction statistics, explicit D4 judgement, or user feedback evidence
layout_policy must record language_pair_profile, language_profile_json, language_profile_sha256, and layout_strategy
for each multi-line body/footnote/heading block choose region_reflow unless there is a recorded D4 reason
set source_separator_policy so visible untranslated anchors such as years, numeric headings, bullets, or separator labels split reflow regions
for aligned wide body paragraphs choose body_flow only when current-run x/width/y-gap statistics prove one continuous article column
inside body_flow set paragraph_gap_pt and line_joiner rules so same-paragraph continuations do not receive forced paragraph separators
short same-column continuation lines may join active body_flow only through allow_short_continuation_lines and min_continuation_width_page_ratio
on dense table/chart pages preserve cells and legends, but allow lower-page body copy bands through allow_dense_page_body_below_y_ratio when geometry proves article text

on matrix/table-diagram pages keep normal body_flow disabled, but allow page-top large headings and page-top lead body reflow when current-run geometry proves those regions are outside the table/diagram body
heading classification must use current-run font hierarchy; do not classify normal 10-12pt lead/body copy as heading unless median-font evidence supports it
target_language_reflow may expand only declared region_kinds and must use overlap_guard against the next same-column region
for wide Note/Notes blocks after tables choose table_note and preserve the source-relative note/body font hierarchy
for dense table/chart pages classify compact labels and cells as table_cell and keep them out of body_flow unless D4 records an exception
for narrow vertical navigation choose draw_modes.vertical_nav=rotated_horizontal_text_image instead of stacked character text
for compact table labels, chart ticks, legends, or vertical navigation choose line_preserve
record any visual_only image-text regions as OCR/tooling boundaries
if compact labels need shorter target-language text, require layout_variants in semantic translations rather than generator hardcoded replacements

bindings.current_gap: The semantic generator consumes validated translations, redacts source-language text per unit, probes textbox fit on a temporary page before drawing, reflows paragraph/footnote/body_flow blocks into target-language regions, repairs extractable text lines whose bbox is generically merged with trailing decorative numerals, preserves neutral/already-target-language lines under the shared line_is_translatable rule, and can use policy-declared constrained text-image fallback with wrapped text for table_note, footnote, and zh-to-en body_flow after textbox probing fails. Product-quality may still fail visual gates, but line-by-line source bbox copying, failed-probe residue, placeholder semantic failure, pseudo-translation semantic failure, fixed paragraph separators between every source-wrapped line, and missing page-top heading/lead-body reflow on geometry-proven cases must not occur.

tool_first: tools/validators/write_visual_adjudication.py when deterministic role gates are sufficient or after model/human D7 review is recorded

slot_bindings.visual_metrics: product_quality_gates.json page_metrics including source/output font_hierarchy and ratio deltas
slot_bindings.visual_region_metrics: visual_region_metrics.json role_gates including source_relative_visual_baseline, region_metrics with source_median_font_size and output_to_source_font_ratio, page_metrics, and crop evidence refs
comparison_refs: source-vs-output crop contact sheets from tools/renderers/render_source_output_crop.py when visual failures are suspected
back-rotated output crop from render_source_output_crop.py for side navigation glyph-orientation checks

bindings.product_quality_requirement: After a candidate PDF exists, missing candidate render, visual_region_metrics, visual_repair_plan, visual_adjudication, or product_quality_gates is a process-contract failure. A D7 blocking failure must route to D8/Lx_RepairLoop unless D8 records an explicit unrepairable reason.

tool_first: tools/run_semantic_product_quality_round.py must write repair_loop_<n>.json for every entered repair loop; a visual_repair_plan.json alone is not loop execution evidence
produces: optional revised layout/translation/candidate artifacts when a repair atom executor is available

tool_first: tools/validators/validate_workspace_boundary.py when operation logs need a final containment review
